CVE-2026-12205.title: Crypt::DSA versions before 1.21 for Perl reused the nonce across  ...
CVE-2026-12205.description:
Crypt::DSA versions before 1.21 for Perl reused the nonce across signatures, leading to private-key recovery.

Crypt::DSA::sign caches the per-signature nonce material in the Key object without ever clearing it.

The first sign() on a Key object picks a nonce, and every later sign() on that same object reuses it, producing an identical "r".

Keys used to sign more than once with an affected version should be considered compromised.

CVE-2026-1457.title: An authenticated buffer handling flaw in TP-Link VIGI C385 V1 Web ...
CVE-2026-1457.description: An authenticated buffer handling flaw in TP-Link VIGI C385 V1 Web API lacking input sanitization, may allow memory corruption leading to remote code execution. Authenticated attackers may trigger buffer overflow and potentially execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges.

CVE-2026-8700.title: Crypt::DSA versions before 1.20 for Perl generate seeds using ran ...
CVE-2026-8700.description:
Crypt::DSA versions before 1.20 for Perl generate seeds using rand.

Seeds were generated using Perl's built-in rand function, which is predictable and unsuitable for security usage.

CVE-2026-8704.title: Crypt::DSA versions through 1.19 for Perl use 2-args open, allowi ...
CVE-2026-8704.description: Crypt::DSA versions through 1.19 for Perl use 2-args open, allowing existing files to be modified.
